creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
(In reply to Tatsuki Makino from comment #1)

The execution of this alias is prevented from being executed when the pkg configuration file at /usr/local/etc/pkg.conf is in a bad shape. Due to reasons unknown on several of our hosts/jails the pkg.conf file was a kind of really short (someone customized it or remnant of previusly installed pkg versions). I did not investigate this further, simply replaced that obvious outdated file with the sample with the minor adjustments of our liking (we'd like to have the RC scripts handled by pkg and on some boxes we need a proxy).

After this cleanup, everything worked as expected!

Sorry for the noise.
